reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all the staff. Friendly and always helpful. Our guests don't hesitate to stop by, just like we do. Thank you!

reviews.comment:
Buen precio en combustible, Un lujo, los baños super limpios , muy buena atención del personal, comimos en el shop, por 1440pesos dos ensaladas un sándwich de crudo y una power grande, espectacular,

(Translated by Google)
Good price on fuel, a real treat, the bathrooms were super clean, the staff was very attentive, we ate at the shop, for 1440 pesos we got two salads, a ham sandwich and a large power beer, spectacular!
